# Rule: payment_card_pan_first6
# Category: financial
# Jurisdiction: global (PCI DSS)
#
# Keeps only the first 6 digits (BIN); preserves dashes and spaces.
# Example: 4111-1111-1111-1111 → 4111-11**-****-****.
